title: Flamingo/Spoonbill - Software update for standalone headset
scenario: DFU (software update) completes successfully on a standalone headset (not paired with charge case) via Poly Studio Mobile app Device Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure the standalone headset (not paired with a charge case) is connected to the app.
3. Tap the update button on the device Home screen.
4. Verify that Device Settings opens with the Software Update tab expanded and only one "Update" button is visible.
6. Complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process as prompted by the app.
expected: The DFU process for the standalone headset completes successfully without errors.
